items.title: Federal Decree-Law No. (32) of 2021 Regarding Commercial Companies
items.text: Primary UAE company-law source for corporate governance, shareholder rights, and remedies affecting company management disputes.

items.title: Commercial Companies Law: member-rights and management-prejudice context
items.text: Use this authority when the sealed findings point to exclusion from meetings, signature control, access to company information, or prejudicial management conduct affecting a shareholder or member.
items.source: Federal Decree-Law No. (32) of 2021 Regarding Commercial Companies

items.title: Federal Decree-Law No. (34) of 2021 On Countering Rumors and Cybercrimes: Article 9
items.text: The law criminalizes unauthorized acquisition of a PIN code, cipher, password, or similar access credential, and aggravates matters where those credentials are used to access a system to commit a crime.

items.title: Federal Decree-Law No. (34) of 2021 On Countering Rumors and Cybercrimes: Article 7 context
items.text: The law treats unauthorized acquisition, alteration, disclosure, copying, or dissemination of confidential commercial or economic data as a serious offence category when done through information technology.

items.title: Federal Decree-Law No. (34) of 2021 On Countering Rumors and Cybercrimes: Article 65
items.text: Electronic evidence derived from devices, media, systems, software, or information technology means is given probative force, which matters when sealed findings are being prepared for complaint or prosecution channels.
